text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, May 12. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Sleep quality is so important. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. CareConnect prep is moving along. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
